items.label: Starlink
items.headline: SpaceX and Google Forge $30 Billion AI Infrastructure Partnership Amid Competition and IPO Preparations
items.summary: SpaceX and Google have signed a $30 billion AI infrastructure deal, enhancing Google's Gemini Enterprise platform and diversifying SpaceX's revenue as it prepares for a public offering.
